description:
You are an edge-computing engineer preparing a staged deployment of software
    bundles to several ARM-based IoT devices.  
    Your goal is to create a **deterministic, testable package-management
    workspace** under the path  
    /home/user/iot_deployment

    1.  Directory layout  
        •  /home/user/iot_deployment/                 (root of the workspace)  
        •  /home/user/iot_deployment/staging/         (holds the manifest)  

    2.  Required files and their EXACT target paths  

        a)  /home/user/iot_deployment/staging/package_plan.csv  
            This CSV MUST contain *exactly* four lines (including the header) and
            must use **comma separators – no spaces**.  
            Line-breaks must be Unix style “\n”.  
            Content ***must be identical*** to:

            package,version,arch
            edgeos,2.1.3,armv7
            iot-sdk,0.9.4,armv7
            tiny-mqtt,1.2.0,armv7

        b)  /home/user/iot_deployment/install.log  
            Simulate installing the three packages in **parallel** background
            commands.  Each parallel job must append ONE line to install.log using
            the following rigid format (no leading/trailing spaces):

            [OK] <package>@<version> installed for <arch>

            Example for edgeos:
            [OK] edgeos@2.1.3 installed for armv7

            The jobs are parallel, so the *initial* ordering in install.log is
            non-deterministic and **must not be edited** before every job finishes
            (use a shell “wait” or equivalent technique).

        c)  /home/user/iot_deployment/install_sorted.log  
            Once all parallel jobs have finished, create this file by
            alphabetically sorting install.log **by package name**.  
            After sorting it must contain ***exactly*** the three lines below
            (in this order – Unix “\n” line-breaks, no blank lines):

            [OK] edgeos@2.1.3 installed for armv7
            [OK] iot-sdk@0.9.4 installed for armv7
            [OK] tiny-mqtt@1.2.0 installed for armv7

        d)  /home/user/iot_deployment/verification_summary.txt  
            This is the final hand-off file for QA.  It must contain **exactly**
            the three lines below (no extra whitespace, Unix “\n” line-breaks):

            Manifest: /home/user/iot_deployment/staging/package_plan.csv
            Install log: /home/user/iot_deployment/install_sorted.log
            Status: COMPLETE

    3.  Constraints & hints  
        •  You do NOT need root privileges; touching files is enough to
           “simulate” installation.  
        •  Make sure the workspace directories exist before writing files.  
        •  Use background operators (&) or any other parallelisation method you
           like, but the three installation lines must be appended by **three
           separate jobs running concurrently**.  
        •  Only once every job is finished should you create the sorted log.  
        •  Do not hard-code full file contents in one shell redirection; the test
           will look for evidence of parallel command use (multiple shell
           processes).  
        •  All paths in the summary file must be absolute and match the exact
           paths given above character-for-character.  

    4.  Verification the autograder will perform  
        •  Confirm that package_plan.csv exists and its MD5 matches the exact text
           shown above.  
        •  Confirm that install.log has exactly three lines, each matching the
           required pattern, and that their *timestamps* in the filesystem differ
           by less than two seconds (parallel proof).  
        •  Confirm install_sorted.log exists, is alphabetically ordered, and
           matches the three canonical lines.  
        •  Confirm verification_summary.txt matches the required three lines.  

    Produce no additional output files outside /home/user/iot_deployment.  
    When everything is finished, you are done.
truth:
# Directory that must exist
    path_workspace: /home/user/iot_deployment
    path_staging: /home/user/iot_deployment/staging

    # package_plan.csv exact content
    csv_expected: |
        package,version,arch
        edgeos,2.1.3,armv7
        iot-sdk,0.9.4,armv7
        tiny-mqtt,1.2.0,armv7

    # Sorted installation log exact lines
    sorted_log_expected: |
        [OK] edgeos@2.1.3 installed for armv7
        [OK] iot-sdk@0.9.4 installed for armv7
        [OK] tiny-mqtt@1.2.0 installed for armv7

    # Verification summary exact content
    verification_summary_expected: |
        Manifest: /home/user/iot_deployment/staging/package_plan.csv
        Install log: /home/user/iot_deployment/install_sorted.log
        Status: COMPLETE

    # File list the grader will check
    files_to_check:
        - /home/user/iot_deployment/staging/package_plan.csv
        - /home/user/iot_deployment/install.log
        - /home/user/iot_deployment/install_sorted.log
        - /home/user/iot_deployment/verification_summary.txt
